definition:
A man living at the time of Divided Monarchy, first mentioned at 2Ki.25.22; 
 son of: Ahikam (H0296)
Another spelling of ge.dal.yah (גְּדַלְיָ֫הוּ "Gedaliah" H1436B)
 § Gedaliah = "Jehovah is great"
1) a son of Jeduthun in the time of David
2) governor of Judea
3) son of Pashur, one of the chiefs of Jerusalem in the time of Jeremiah
